name: PELVIC LIPOMATOSIS & FIBROLIPOMATOSIS
definition: nonmalignant overgrowth of adipose tissue with minimal fibrotic + inflammatory components

demographics.Mean age: 48 (range, 9-80) years; M÷F = 10÷1 to 18÷1; racial predilection for blacks (67%);
demographics.Path: unencapsulated mature homogeneous white fat separated by thin fibrous septa

discriminating_features: elongation + elevation of urinary bladder with symmetric inverted pear shape / teardrop
medial / lateral displacement of lower ureters

general: elongation + elevation of urinary bladder with symmetric inverted pear shape / teardrop
medial / lateral displacement of lower ureters
GI tract: stretching + elevation of rectosigmoid and sigmoid colon out of pelvis
